{{Quote|Blue lady is trouble.|Writing on men's refresher stall at Locru's Central Saloon|<ref name="starhoppers" />}}
'''Azoora''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] who lived on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Known for her beauty among the residents of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[Tun Aduban]], Azoora frequented the town's nightlife and developed a troublesome reputation. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Azoora had an encounter with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|hero]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], although it was interrupted when Azoora's jealous "boyfriend" [[Warto]] attacked the offworlder.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Why don't we take a walk and swap life-stories, star-hopper? You tell me yours... and I'll tell you mine.|Azoora, to Han Solo|<ref name="marvel7" />}}
A [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]], Azoora was a native of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]]. Well known among the local [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], Azoora earned a reputation as "trouble"—and also earned the attention of [[Warto]], a hulking [[Boltrunian/Legends|Boltrunian]] who styled himself as Azoora's boyfriend.<ref name="starhoppers" /> Warto was known to threaten any other men whom he saw talking to Azoora.<ref name="marvel7" />

Azoora frequented [[Locru's Central Saloon]] in the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Tun Aduban]], where in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] she encountered notorious [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Solo approached Azoora at the bar, and after a short flirtation, Solo accepted Azoora's offer to leave with her and take a walk. However, Solo was quickly interrupted by a [[Ramiz|stranger]] and Azoora slipped away in the crowd.<ref name="marvel7" />

Solo soon found himself accosted by Warto, who attacked him for flirting with his "girlfriend," although Warto was sent packing in a barroom brawl by Solo's [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] friend [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].<ref name="marvel8">[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]]</ref> Two years later, Azoora met with Rebel historian [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]], who was trying to piece together the story of Solo's travels after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Azoora gave Na'al information about the local [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|gangs]] before threats from her current boyfriend forced Na'al to cut the interview short.<ref name="starhoppers" />

==Personality and traits==
A [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned Wroonian,<ref name="starhoppers" /> Azoora was regarded as beautiful by the men who encountered her, although she had a troublesome reputation on Aduba-3. Azoora had a flirtatious nature,<ref name="marvel7" /> something that tormented her self-proclaimed boyfriend, Warto.<ref name="marvel8" />

==Behind the scenes==
Azoora first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 7|''Star Wars'' (1977) 7]], written by [[Roy Thomas]] and [[Howard Chaykin]] and released in [[1977]].<ref name="marvel7" /> Although she went unnamed in her first appearance, her name was given in the next issue, [[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]].<ref name="marvel8" /> In her lone comic appearance, Azoora was illustrated by Chaykin.<ref name="marvel7" />
